meaning: Data Access Arrangement,数据访问排列
examples: In February the FTC and Digital Advertising Alliance (DAA) agreed that the industry would get cracking on responding to DNT requests.

The DAA does not require companies to honor DNT signals fixed by the browser manufacturers and set by them in browsers.
